'''竏營-th-f''' ('''kazathaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wag|wag]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wag|wag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營-th-f
|-
! Lemma
| kazathaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizathaf|thizathaf]] || [[word:jizathaf|jizathaf]] || [[word:shizathaf|shizathaf]] || [[word:kizathaf|kizathaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzathaf|thuthuzathaf]] || [[word:jujuzathaf|jujuzathaf]] || [[word:shushuzathaf|shushuzathaf]] || [[word:kukuzathaf|kukuzathaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzathaf|thuzathaf]] || [[word:juzathaf|juzathaf]] || [[word:shuzathaf|shuzathaf]] || [[word:kuzathaf|kuzathaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzathaf|thuzathaf]] || [[word:juzathaf|juzathaf]] || [[word:shuzathaf|shuzathaf]] || [[word:kuzathaf|kuzathaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezathaf|thezathaf]] || [[word:jezathaf|jezathaf]] || [[word:shezathaf|shezathaf]] || [[word:kezathaf|kezathaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozathaf|thothozathaf]] || [[word:jojozathaf|jojozathaf]] || [[word:shoshozathaf|shoshozathaf]] || [[word:kokozathaf|kokozathaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozathaf|thozathaf]] || [[word:jozathaf|jozathaf]] || [[word:shozathaf|shozathaf]] || [[word:kozathaf|kozathaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozathaf|thozathaf]] || [[word:jozathaf|jozathaf]] || [[word:shozathaf|shozathaf]] || [[word:kozathaf|kozathaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]] || [[word:zathaf|zathaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦzathaf|thﾃｦzathaf]] || [[word:jﾃｦzathaf|jﾃｦzathaf]] || [[word:shﾃｦzathaf|shﾃｦzathaf]] || [[word:kﾃｦzathaf|kﾃｦzathaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazathaf|thathazathaf]] || [[word:jajazathaf|jajazathaf]] || [[word:shashazathaf|shashazathaf]] || [[word:kakazathaf|kakazathaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazathaf|thazathaf]] || [[word:jazathaf|jazathaf]] || [[word:shazathaf|shazathaf]] || [[word:kazathaf|kazathaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazathaf|thazathaf]] || [[word:jazathaf|jazathaf]] || [[word:shazathaf|shazathaf]] || [[word:kazathaf|kazathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazathaf|shazathaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazathaf|goshazathaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazathaf|gokishazathaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazathafnﾃｼ|shazathafnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazathafnknﾃｼ|goshazathafnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazathafnﾃｼ|gokishazathafnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazathafshﾃｫ|shazathafshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazathafnkshﾃｫ|goshazathafnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazathafshﾃｫ|gokishazathafshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazathafro|shazathafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazathafnkro|goshazathafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazathafro|gokishazathafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazathafmu|shazathafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazathafnkmu|goshazathafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazathafmu|gokishazathafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazathafsher|shazathafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazathafnksher|goshazathafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazathafsher|gokishazathafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazathafng|shazathafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazathafnkng|goshazathafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazathafng|gokishazathafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazathafya|shazathafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazathafnkya|goshazathafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazathafya|gokishazathafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazathafyam|shazathafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazathafnkyam|goshazathafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazathafyam|gokishazathafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazathafnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shazathafnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazathafnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshazathafnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazathafnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishazathafnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazathafnﾃｼro|shazathafnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazathafnknﾃｼro|goshazathafnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazathafnﾃｼro|gokishazathafnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazathafnﾃｼmu|shazathafnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazathafnknﾃｼmu|goshazathafnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazathafnﾃｼmu|gokishazathafnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazathafshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shazathafshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazathafnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshazathafnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazathafshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishazathafshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazathafshﾃｫro|shazathafshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazathafnkshﾃｫro|goshazathafnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazathafshﾃｫro|gokishazathafshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazathafshﾃｫmu|shazathafshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazathafnkshﾃｫmu|goshazathafnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazathafshﾃｫmu|gokishazathafshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazathafronﾃｼ|shazathafronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazathafnkronﾃｼ|goshazathafnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazathafronﾃｼ|gokishazathafronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazathafroshﾃｫ|shazathafroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazathafnkroshﾃｫ|goshazathafnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazathafroshﾃｫ|gokishazathafroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazathafromu|shazathafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazathafnkromu|goshazathafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazathafromu|gokishazathafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazathafmunﾃｼ|shazathafmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazathafnkmunﾃｼ|goshazathafnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazathafmunﾃｼ|gokishazathafmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazathafmushﾃｫ|shazathafmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazathafnkmushﾃｫ|goshazathafnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazathafmushﾃｫ|gokishazathafmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazathafmuro|shazathafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazathafnkmuro|goshazathafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazathafmuro|gokishazathafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
